subcodes.first_line: O servants of God! The tyrannical oppressors, like bloodthirsty hounds, have torn asunder the breasts of the gazelles of the divine meadow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی ظالمان ستمکار مانند سگان خونخوار آهوان دشت یزدانرا سینه دریدند
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity
